kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Mallet goes with at least two of Cedric, Blacksmith, Riverside, and 5 coins.
The artisan with the Saw's levy is higher than both Rowan and the artisan in Bridgegate.
If Saw does not go with Oldwall, then Godfrey goes with Loom.
Either Cooper goes with Loom or someone in the Joiners' Guild goes with 3 coins.
Between 3 coins and 5 coins, one goes with Fletcher and the other with Awl.
Weaver goes with at least two of Matilda, Awl, Kingsford, and 6 coins.
Awl goes with exactly two of Matilda, Southgate, and 5 coins.
No members of the Joiners' Guild are in the Market Ward.
Either Awl goes with Bridgegate or someone in the Joiners' Guild goes with Bridgegate (but not both).
If either 4 coins goes with Southgate or Riverside does not go with 3 coins (but not both), then either Weaver goes with 5 coins or 4 coins goes with Beatrix (but not both).

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Swimbait goes with at least two of Esther, Bass, Mossbank, and 4 lb.
The angler using the Wobbler's weight is higher than both Wade and the angler at Birchpool.
If Wobbler does not go with Grayreach, then Mabel goes with Spoon.
Either Bluegill goes with Spoon or someone in the Pike Family goes with 2 lb.
Between 2 lb and 4 lb, one goes with Catfish and the other with Crankbait.
Perch goes with at least two of Royce, Crankbait, Foxglen, and 5 lb.
Crankbait goes with exactly two of Royce, Pinehollow, and 4 lb.
No members of the Pike Family are in the North Watershed.
Either Crankbait goes with Birchpool or someone in the Pike Family goes with Birchpool (but not both).
If either 3 lb goes with Pinehollow or Mossbank does not go with 2 lb (but not both), then either Perch goes with 4 lb or 3 lb goes with Cody (but not both).
